hooks.command: bash -lc 'root="${WORKSPACE_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then root=$(cygpath -u "$root" 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "$root"); fi; if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/.claude/hooks/inject-rust-env.sh" ]; then bash "$root/.claude/hooks/inject-rust-env.sh"; else exit 0; fi'

bash -lc 'root="${WORKSPACE_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then root=$(cygpath -u "$root" 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "$root"); fi; if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/.claude/hooks/guard-bash.sh" ]; then bash "$root/.claude/hooks/guard-bash.sh"; else exit 0; fi'

bash -lc 'root="${WORKSPACE_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then root=$(cygpath -u "$root" 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "$root"); fi; if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/.claude/hooks/guard-secrets.sh" ]; then bash "$root/.claude/hooks/guard-secrets.sh"; else exit 0; fi'
